title: Smoky Creamy Turkish Cheese Tagine
description: A rich, creamy, and smoky Turkish dish made with liquid cheese, perfect for a midnight craving. This vegan-friendly recipe uses a tagine to cook the cheese to perfection.

ingredients.name: Kashk (Turkish yogurt whey) or non-dairy yogurt

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together the vegan cream cheese, kashk or non-dairy yogurt, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the liquid smoke, if using, and whisk until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a tagine or a large saucepan with a heavy bottom, such as a Dutch oven.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the cheese has melted and the mixture is smooth.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and dill, if desired.
Serve the tagine with pita bread or crackers, if desired.
